{{CargoOrgan
|name=Mane of Chaos
|type=Bionic
|rank=red
|id=10696
|idx=54
|description="Chaos and Oblivion walk the stars; when They descend upon a new world, it marks the end of days!"
— Codex Draconis
|skill=The doomsday descends, dealing DMG equal to 220% of ATK, and applies 1 stack of Annihilation to the enemy!
|hp=2566
|def=226
|atk=189
|rush=398
|gene1=Per organ awakened, {race} HP +70
Organs awakened: 40/40
|gene2=Per Altar God Descent, {race} DEF +7
Gods Descended: 30/30
|gene3=Healing +12%
|gene4=Chance to trigger Stonehide +4%
|gene5=ELMT RES +4%
|gene6=Snail Arena, enemy HP Regen -24%
|gene7=Healing +12% (Awakened)
|}}
